title: koeleria vaseyi
intro: Koeleria vaseyi, also known as Vasey's Koeleria, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Koeleria vaseyi include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress relief and anxiety. Koeleria vaseyi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
